title: Fragrant Lazy Malaysian Passion Fruit Biryani
description: A citrusy and flavorful Malaysian dish featuring passion fruit pulp, perfect for a lazy Sunday, with a Mediterranean twist and score-fat for added richness.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the basmati rice and stir to coat the rice with oil and mix with the onion and garlic.
Add the passion fruit pulp, score-fat, salt, and black pepper, and stir well.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let the biryani rest for 5 minutes.
Fluff the biryani with a fork and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
